task_completion.description: Open the Product.java file in the Eclipse IDE
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Eclipse IDE is open with Product.java visible in the editor.

task_completion.description: Open the 'Generate hashCode() and equals()' dialog
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Generate hashCode() and equals()' dialog box is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Select only the sku field for equality
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the generation dialog, ONLY the 'sku' checkbox is checked. The checkboxes for 'id', 'name', 'price', and 'stockQuantity' must be unchecked.

task_completion.description: Configure the generation style to use java.util.Objects
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the generation dialog, the option to use Java 7+ (java.util.Objects) is selected, OR the generated code in the editor explicitly shows the use of Objects.hash and Objects.equals.

task_completion.description: Verify the generated hashCode() and equals() methods in the editor
task_completion.visual_evidence: The generated hashCode() and equals() methods are visible in the Product.java editor, containing logic only for the 'sku' field and utilizing java.util.Objects.hash and java.util.Objects.equals.

integrity.description: The agent used the Eclipse IDE to generate the code
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Eclipse GUI (menus, dialogs) rather than terminal commands like sed or echo.

integrity.description: The agent used Eclipse's built-in generation feature
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Generate hashCode() and equals()' dialog is seen in the screenshots, indicating the agent didn't just paste pre-written code.

integrity.description: Modifications were made to the correct file in the project
integrity.visual_evidence: The Eclipse Package Explorer or editor tab confirms the file being edited is InventorySystem/src/main/java/com/store/model/Product.java.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project path: /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/InventorySystem. Source file: src/main/java/com/store/model/Product.java. Required field for equality: 'sku' (business key). Forbidden fields: 'id', 'name', 'price', 'stockQuantity'. Required style: java.util.Objects.hash and java.util.Objects.equals.
